name: NinjaVan
description: Southeast Asian logistics provider with OAuth 2.0 Plugin API integration. Supports Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, Vietnam, Philippines, and Myanmar.
author: Spwig

client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.help_text: OAuth Client ID from NinjaVan Dashboard (Settings > IT Settings)

client_secret.label: Client Secret
client_secret.help_text: OAuth Client Secret from NinjaVan Dashboard (Settings > IT Settings)

country_code.label: Country
country_code.help_text: Country where your NinjaVan account is registered

environment.label: Environment
environment.help_text: Use sandbox for testing. Production requires passing NinjaVan's integration audit.

changes: Removed inline CSS from setup_instructions.html to comply with design standards
Setup instructions now use consolidated wizard CSS (wizard-base.css and provider-wizard.css)
Improved consistency and maintainability of setup UI
OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with token refresh
Order creation for 7 Southeast Asian countries (SG, MY, TH, ID, VN, PH, MM)
Order cancellation for Pending Pickup orders
COD, pickup scheduling, and time slot support
Integration audit compliance for production access
Note: Rate calculation not supported (Plugin API design)
